key_points: Federalism balances national unity with regional autonomy
Coming together federations are formed when independent states join together
Holding together federations divide powers within a large country
Decentralisation strengthens democracy by transferring powers to local governments
The 73rd and 74th Constitutional Amendments strengthened local governance
examples: USA and Switzerland are examples of coming together federations
India is an example of a holding together federation
Gram Panchayat works at the village level
Municipalities manage governance in towns and cities
exam_tips: Explain the difference between coming together and holding together federations
Understand the importance of decentralisation in democracy
Learn the structure of Panchayati Raj institutions
Use real examples when explaining federalism in answers
